item.title: _CobyBryant_: Around The NFL reposteó Coby Bryant @_CobyBryant_ · 46min Creating my own legacy with #2! I started football wearing 2!
item.description: Around The NFL reposteó Coby Bryant @_CobyBryant_ · 46min Creating my own legacy with #2! I started football wearing 2! It’s reasons behind it.! 26 50 721 17 mil

item.title: TomPelissero: Tom Pelissero @TomPelissero · 16min Former Florida State QB Tommy Castellanos has drawn interest ahead of the NFL Draft
item.description:
Tom Pelissero @TomPelissero · 16min Former Florida State QB Tommy Castellanos has drawn interest ahead of the NFL Draft as a quarterback — and a slot receiver.
Castellanos, who also played at UCF and BC, did WR drills at the end of his pro day and is training at both positions. De ACC Network 18 43 226 40 mil
